fixes.fix: added exact: true to getByRole call to prevent 'Brands' matching 'For Brands'; also switched to anchor.first() to be safe when exact match returns desktop + mobile duplicates
updated expected href from /for-buyers to /professionals — MainNav NAV_LINKS maps label 'For Buyers' to route /professionals per SOCELLE-WEB CLAUDE.md §C
updated expected href from /pricing to /plans — MainNav NAV_LINKS maps label 'Pricing' to route /plans per SOCELLE-WEB CLAUDE.md §C
added AUTH_EXEMPT_PATHS filter (['/forgot-password', '/reset-password']) to publicRoutes derivation — auth transactional pages are exempt from SEO meta requirements per CLAUDE.md §4.1 Category A
